sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14507" key="a)prospaqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπροσ-πᾰθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n14507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without affection</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">passion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:11p.438M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11p.438M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
